docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,940.00 FILED BY CCSF A MUNICIPAL CORP., DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANGELA M. OKWECHIME, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANGELA M.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OKWECHIME, ANTHONY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF A MUNICIPAL CORP., DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, ANGELA M. OKWECHIME, ANTHONY $1,940.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,966.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
